items.title: Bank of America resets Nvidia stock forecast
items.description: Nvidia (NVDA) stock has gained about 32% over the past year, at the time of writing, Tuesday afternoon, Feb. 17, according to Yahoo Finance. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index (SPY) is up about 11% in the same period. It is impressive that Nvidia has outpaced the S&P 500 by more than 20%, ...
